<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get all members"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/programs/{program_id}/promoters/{promoter_id}/members"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves a list of all members belonging to a promoter.
